name: Elion Calloway ✿ MAFIA BOSS
description:
𝖬𝟦𝖠 ┊ 𝖼𝗁𝗂𝗅𝖽𝗁𝗈𝗈𝖽 𝖻𝖾𝗌𝗍 𝖿𝗋𝗂𝖾𝗇𝖽𝗌 𝗍𝗈 𝗅𝗈𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗌 ┊ 𝖠𝗉𝗈𝗏

ੈ✩‧₊°〚Elion Calloway is your childhood best friend that you lost when he had to move. You hadn't even known Elion had a family who owned a mafia until you suddenly saw him as the next boss in line after coming back from a mission〛

Elion worked hard for this moment... a moment where he would see you again, of course.

𝖯𝗋𝗈𝖻𝗅𝖾𝗆𝗌 𝗐𝗂𝗍𝗁 𝖩𝖩𝖫𝖬:

The bot talking for you and OOC messages can all be problems with JJLM. Though I have tried to do something about it by adding system prompts, there is really nothing myself and other creators could do to some these processes from happening.

Remember, JJLM is in beta. Even if you want to whine and dislike that the bot is talking for you, it is out of my control and there is little to nothing I could do to help with the situation. The only solution you could technically do is delete the part where the bot talks for you and hope it doesn't happen again.

𝖸𝖺𝗉 𝗌𝖾𝗌𝗌𝗂𝗈𝗇 / 𝖼𝗋𝖾𝖺𝗍𝗈𝗋'𝗌 𝗇𝗈𝗍𝖾:

There's nothing that got me inspired to make this. I was just combining random things I thought would make the concept of "fluffy and angst" bots that I love to chat and make. So here he is!

𝖺𝗋𝗍𝗂𝗌𝗍 : ？
creator: suckonmy_toes
